title: PridePixels
description: A mod that adds Tools,Weapons and Armor
body:
You ever wanted to have Pride that is not only a re-texture of Vanilla Items?
Then this mod is for you! This mod adds items representing 10 Different Pride/Queer groups all with their own uniqe effects and gears!
"Queer" being the most powerful one and end game material.

Adds:
Aroace
Bi
Demigender
Genderfluid
Lesbian
MLM/Gay
Nonbinary
Pan
Transgender
Queer
